Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search CRM leads with a query related to "Kendra Lawson" or "Kendra" (or similar) using crm_search_leads or crm_get_lead to retrieve Kendra Lawson's full lead record confirming her leadsource field already shows "Realtor referral - Alicia Grant" (createdate 2026-03-24 13:22), her rating/status, and the notes referencing Alicia Grant as the referring agent.
OE 2: Search CRM contacts with a query related to "Kendra Lawson" (or similar) using crm_search_contacts or crm_get_contact to retrieve Kendra's contact record (email kendra.lawson@gmail.com, jobtitle HR Manager; note the lead record separately carries the Piedmont Dental Group company and the Alicia Grant referral source).
OE 3: Retrieve CRM engagements tied to the Kendra Lawson account using crm_list_engagements to find the existing engagement notes around 2026-03-24 including "Direct call claim" (13:24, Derek logging Kendra's direct-call claim), "Referral note" (13:30, Carlos flagging Alicia Grant referral), "Attribution issue" (14:17, Jordan pulled in, hold ownership decision for review), "Carlos case to Grace" (14:27), "Derek case to Grace" (14:29), "Commission hold" (14:46, comp hold pending Grace assignment decision), and "Manager review opened" (14:57, Grace reviewing timestamps and holding assignment/comp).
OE 4: Search Slack with a query related to "Kendra Lawson" or "Kendra" (or similar) using conversations_search_messages or conversations_history to retrieve the dispute thread from 2026-03-24 Derek Moss claiming she came to him direct (~16:29), Carlos Rivera stating he set her up from Alicia Grant and marked the referral in LOS (~16:33), Carlos objecting that Kendra is showing up under Derek (~16:45), the comp-hold message (~17:35), and Grace Yamamoto pulling Kendra into review and freezing assignment/comp (~17:46).
OE 5: Search emails with a query related to "Kendra Lawson" or "Kendra" (or similar) using search_emails to retrieve the internal correspondence from around 2026-03-24 "Kendra Lawson referral timeline," "Kendra Lawson assignment," and "Commission hold on Kendra Lawson file" threads sent by Carlos Rivera, Derek Moss, Hana Kim, and Grace Yamamoto.
OE 6: Search LOS for a Kendra Lawson loan file and pull LN-2026-00192 using mortgage_los_search_loans or mortgage_los_get_loan establishing the material fact that LN-2026-00192 in LOS does NOT reflect Kendra Lawson as the borrower (the record on file is a different borrower, status "denied", created 2026-01-05) and that no LOS borrower record for Kendra Lawson exists at all. This contradicts Carlos's Slack claim of "Just set up Kendra Lawson / LN-2026-00192" and is a key piece of evidence for the ownership reconciliation.
OE 7: Look up contact details for Derek Moss, Carlos Rivera, and Robert Calloway using contacts_search_contacts or contacts_get_contacts to retrieve derek.moss@keystonemortgage.com, carlos.rivera@keystonemortgage.com, and r.calloway@keystonemortgage.com for the evidence-summary email recipients and CC.
OE 8: Create a CRM engagement note on the Kendra Lawson account using crm_create_engagement with body documenting the reconciled evidence timeline (CRM leadsource, Slack timestamps, LOS file creation, Carlos's Alicia Grant referral claim vs Derek's walk-in claim) so payroll has a record when Grace rules on ownership. (Write action - Outcome.)
OE 9: Send an email from jordan.blake@keystonemortgage.com to derek.moss@keystonemortgage.com and carlos.rivera@keystonemortgage.com with r.calloway@keystonemortgage.com in CC using send_email, body summarizing the evidence gathered on the Kendra Lawson ownership dispute so both LOs see the same record before Grace's decision. (Write action - Outcome.)
OE 10: Search emails with a query related to "Marcus Webb" or "resignation" or "two-week notice" (or similar) using search_emails to confirm Marcus Webb submitted his two-week notice to Grace Yamamoto with a last day of April 4, 2026 establishing his effective departure close to a month before the fixed date (April 28, 2026).
OE 11: Search Slack with a query related to "Marcus" or "resigned" or "transition" (or similar) using conversations_search_messages to find the 2026-03-25 message addressed to Denise "Denise quick heads up - Marcus resigned this morning for another brokerage. Need to talk through client transition + any risk items before we start reassigning files." and any subsequent pipeline-handoff discussion.
OE 12: Search CRM deals using crm_search_deals filtered by company_id for each of Jordan's referral partner companies (or use crm_show_data to retrieve all deals) to identify Marcus Webb's 15 deals all currently stuck in the "appointmentscheduled" stage, createdates spanning 2024-05-28 through 2025-08-26, with closedate null, and covering a mix of FHA/Conventional/VA/USDA loan types (each deal's description ending in "LO: Marcus Webb."). Note: crm_search_deals accepts dealname and company_id parameters, and Marcus Webb appears in deal descriptions rather than deal names, so searching by company_id or browsing all deals is the viable path.
OE 13: Retrieve CRM engagement history on Marcus Webb's deals using crm_list_engagements to confirm zero recent activity on any of the 15 deals corroborating the staleness claim and the lack of redistribution after his departure.
OE 14: Search CRM companies for the referral partner accounts Queen City Realty, Fairview Homes, Carolina Home Team, Lake Norman Properties, and Charlotte Relocation Services using crm_search_companies or crm_get_company, and cross-reference to identify which of Marcus Webb's 15 stalled deals are tied to Jordan's referral partners. Of the 15 deals, 8 have company_id mappings to the five partner companies (3 to Queen City Realty, 2 to Carolina Home Team, 1 to Fairview Homes, 1 to Lake Norman Properties, 1 to Charlotte Relocation Services); the remaining 7 deals have no partner association (company_id null) and cannot be directly traced to a referral partner.
OE 15: For each of Jordan's referral partner companies that has one or more of Marcus's stalled deals tied to it, create a CRM engagement note on that partner-side company record using crm_create_engagement, body documenting the affected deal(s), current state, and reassignment status so there's a record on the partner account of where things stand. (Write action - Outcome.)
OE 16: Retrieve the Fairview Homes company record and engagement history using crm_get_company or crm_list_engagements (filtered to Fairview Homes) to establish the referral relationship context and any prior notes relevant to the Mercer file.
OE 17: Search emails with a query related to "Mercer" or "Evan Mercer" or "Fairview permit" or "rate lock extension" (or similar) using search_emails to retrieve the Mercer-file correspondence Fairview builder permit delays, multiple rate lock extension requests, and the dispute over who should cover the second extension cost (Keystone, Fairview, or the borrower).
OE 18: Search Slack with a query related to "Mercer" or "Sterling" or "Fairview" (or similar) using conversations_search_messages to retrieve internal discussion on the Mercer builder-delay situation, including the decision to temporarily hold the extension cost in books pending resolution.
OE 19: Retrieve the Mercer loan file LN-2026-00184 using mortgage_los_search_loans or mortgage_los_get_loan to confirm borrower Evan Mercer, loan_type conventional, status "processing", loan_amount $340,000, rate_lock_date 2026-03-01, rate_lock_expiration 2026-03-23, realtor Lauren Mitchell at fairviewhomes.com, and notes "New construction purchase. Build delays causing rate lock extensions."
OE 20: Retrieve Evan Mercer's borrower record using mortgage_los_get_borrower_by_id with borrower_id los_borrower_de0c3192c720 (or using mortgage_los_get_borrower with email evan.mercer@gmail.com) to pull his contact details (email evan.mercer@gmail.com, address 1287 Copper Run Dr, Charlotte, NC 28277), credit_score 715, annual_income $92,000, and assigned_loan_officer los_staff_a7fa5b29babd.
OE 21: Search QuickBooks bills using quickbooks_search_bills with structured criteria filters (e.g., filtering on DocNumber or Description for Mercer-related entries, or using quickbooks_show_data to browse all bills) to retrieve three Mercer-related bills: BILL-2026-0319-001 ($375, Balance 375, DocNumber LOCK-EXT-00184, TxnDate 2026-03-20, no line description, the earliest lock extension bill still showing unpaid), BILL-2026-0402-001 ($375, Balance 0, DocNumber LOCKEXT-00184-1, "1st lock extension fee for Evan Mercer loan after build delay", the paid first extension), and BILL-2026-0416-002 ($375, Balance 375, DocNumber PENDING-LOCK-EXT-2-MERCER, "Second lock extension fee held pending cost ownership for Mercer loan", the pending second extension at the center of the cost-ownership dispute).
OE 22: List Slack channels using channels_list to retrieve the channel_id for #sales-pipeline (C006) the "sales channel" referenced in the prompt for the team status update.
OE 23: Look up Jordan Blake's own contact details using contacts_search_contacts or contacts_get_contacts to confirm jordan.blake@keystonemortgage.com as the sender and self-recipient for the final write-up email.
OE 24: Post a status update to the #sales-pipeline channel (channel_id C006) using conversations_add_message, with payload summarizing (a) the Kendra Lawson dispute status awaiting Grace's ruling, (b) Marcus Webb's unredistributed pipeline and the partner-side exposure, and (c) the Mercer file / Fairview relationship risk so the team sees the landscape going into the following week. (Write action - Outcome.)
OE 25: Send an email from jordan.blake@keystonemortgage.com to jordan.blake@keystonemortgage.com using send_email with the full write-up covering the Kendra Lawson evidence timeline, Marcus Webb's salvageable vs write-off deals mapped to referral partners, and the Mercer/Fairview situation including the rate lock extension cost standing the document Jordan will carry into his weekly meeting with Robert. (Write action - Outcome.)

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 28, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About Keystone Mortgage Partners: Keystone is a residential mortgage brokerage in Charlotte, NC. The company brokers loans through wholesale lenders. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Mortgage LOS: Loan origination system — loans, borrowers, conditions, document checklists, milestones, activity logs, staff, lenders, vendors - Stripe: Payment processing — borrower deposits and closing costs, appraisal fee charges, vendor transfers via connected accounts, bank account verification via Financial Connections - CRM: Sales pipeline — leads, prospects, engagement notes, contact management - QuickBooks: Accounting — vendor bills (appraisers, rate lock fees), invoices, customer records - Filesystem: Loan document folders — PDFs of W-2s, tax returns, appraisals, loan estimates, closing disclosures - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
universe_idsnapshot-mortgage-broker-v1-7fbfd886

OE 1: Search CRM leads with a query related to "Kendra Lawson" or "Kendra" (or similar) using crm_search_leads or crm_get_lead to retrieve Kendra Lawson's full lead record confirming her leadsource field already shows "Realtor referral - Alicia Grant" (createdate 2026-03-24 13:22), her rating/status, and the notes referencing Alicia Grant as the referring agent.
